< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.CourseAction

Course import and export

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
UserImportsAnImsccPackage

1

User imports an IMSCC package
UserImportsAMbzPackage

2

User imports a MBZ package
UserExportsCourseAsImsccPackage

3

User exports course as IMSCC package
UserExportsCourseAsMbzPackage

4

User exports course as MBZ package
CourseIsCreatedByBulkImportForImsccPackage

5

Course is created by bulk import for IMSCC package
CourseIsCreatedByBulkImportForMbzPackage

6

Course is created by bulk import for MBZ package
